title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Disha Publication

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Disha Publication
jsonLd.description:
Disha Publication invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Disha Publication:
Disha Publication is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication!
